item.title: 'Skilled butcher' murdered, cut up and buried partner
item.description: Anna Podedworna is convicted of the murder of Izabela Zablocka, whose remains were found last year.

item.title: Why British coach is 'game-changer' for Super Bowl winners & NFL
item.description: With Aden Durde having become the first overseas coach to win the Super Bowl, what does it mean for the NFL and the international game?

item.title: The messy Quad God and kitchen blender set to be an Olympic superstar
item.description: Ilia Malinin is not like most figure skaters. Even when he makes mistakes, he is still so far ahead of the rest that he wins Olympic gold.

item.title: US lawmakers accuse justice department of 'inappropriately' redacting Epstein files
item.description: Republican Thomas Massie and Democrat Ro Khanna say the DOJ is not complying with their transparency law.

item.title: William meets female footballers during Saudi Arabia visit
item.description: The Prince of Wales hears about female participation in sport in the Gulf state on the second day of his visit.
